---
name: Mathematical error
about: Report a mathematical error in the paper or in a Lean statement
title: "[math] "
labels: math
---

## Location

<!-- Be specific: paper section / Lean file:line. Examples:
     - paper §6.5, line around eq (21)
     - SqgIdentity/RieszTorus.lean, sqg_selection_rule_Hs at line 1764 -->

## What the paper / Lean currently claims

<!-- Quote or paraphrase the current statement. -->

## Why you believe this is wrong

<!-- The argument. A counterexample is ideal; a gap in the proof is also
     valuable. If it's a constant or sign error, give the corrected
     value and a one-line derivation. -->

## Cross-check

<!-- Have you checked the Lean file, if applicable? Have you run the
     relevant numerical experiment? If you have a computation, attach
     or link the script. -->

## Severity

- [ ] Invalidates a theorem statement
- [ ] Invalidates a proof step (but the statement may still hold)
- [ ] Constant / exponent / sign error that changes a quantitative claim
- [ ] Typo or presentation issue only
